name: Peoplein Limited
analysis: PPE has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 26% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.2× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$0.6600. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.7000, stop A$0.5891, target A$0.8000 (0.90:1) — then trail it.
